title: No error thrown for nonblocking procedural assignment to a wire

features.name: nonblocking procedural assignment to wire in always block
features.description: Code should include a nonblocking procedural assignment to a wire declaration inside a clocked always block
features.snippet:
output wire q;
always @(posedge clk) q <= d;

features.name: wire used as lvalue in nonblocking procedural assignment with reset
features.description: Code should include a wire signal used as lvalue in nonblocking assignments within a reset-containing always block
